context: Tests that the agent uses distinct tag namespaces and specific Match patterns to route each log source to its intended destination, rather than using Match * on all outputs simultaneously.

checklist.name: Distinct tag namespaces
checklist.description: The two INPUT plugins use different Tag values (e.g., app.* and kube.*) rather than the same tag on both

checklist.name: No shared Match *
checklist.description: The Loki OUTPUT and S3 OUTPUT do NOT both use Match * — at least one has a specific match pattern

checklist.name: Scoped Match patterns
checklist.description: Each OUTPUT's Match value corresponds to only the tag namespace of its intended INPUT source

checklist.name: Routing documented
checklist.description: routing.md (or equivalent) maps each INPUT to its corresponding OUTPUT(s) by tag

checklist.name: Retry_Limit on both outputs
checklist.description: Both the Loki OUTPUT and S3 OUTPUT include a numeric Retry_Limit setting

checklist.name: Mem_Buf_Limit on inputs
checklist.description: Both tail INPUT plugins include Mem_Buf_Limit

checklist.name: S3 compression
checklist.description: The S3 OUTPUT includes compression gzip

checklist.name: storage.total_limit_size
checklist.description: At least one OUTPUT includes storage.total_limit_size

checklist.name: Exclude_Path on container input
checklist.description: The tail INPUT watching /var/log/containers/ includes an Exclude_Path that filters out fluent-bit's own logs
